title: Coin Master

Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips.

notes: Trainers, we hope you’re enjoying your adventure in Pokémon GO! We update the app regularly with new events and features, so make sure to check the in-game News to stay up to date.

title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! The Ageless Voidstar Skin Series has been upgraded, with new rally skins and other deluxe skins added. After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

title: Heartopia
notes:
◆ Feature Updates and Optimizations ◆
[Hide & Seek Party]
A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

Shadows fall on Dominion.

Meet Crow.
Dominion’s legend hits the streets again — with a new Relic, full gear, and a Twilight Skin in the Season Pass.

The case is not closed yet!
Crow’s Adventure is live: follow the clues and crack the mystery.

Paint the pond red.
Cascade hits harder with brand-new red gloves.

Tristan powers up!
His new Relic is here — sharper than ever.

title: Dream League Soccer 2026
notes:
It’s our Summer Spotlight update!
•Dynamic Stars – Collect Special Players, upgrading live with national team performances. Coming Soon! 
•New Facility – Upgrade your Fanzone for Clan bonuses and Stadium discounts. 
•International Football – Play our brand new “World Tournament” Event type. 
•Manager Accessories – Take control in style with North American themed items. 
•Clan Improvements – Communicate with new interactions and emoji reactions.

title: Hearthstone
notes:
NEW EXPANSION - Escape from Violet Hold launches with rule-breaking minions and new mechanics!

NEW ARENA SEASON - Jump into the new season with a fresh draft pool and earn the Nefarious Nemsy Hero Skin.

FREE REWARDS - Play in events to help Vanessa's crew escape and unlock free packs and cosmetics.

For full patch notes, visit hearthstone.blizzard.com
